title: fagraea tacapala subsp. ceramensis
intro: Fagraea tacapala subsp. ceramensis is a plant species belonging to the family Gentianaceae, commonly known as the "Ceram fragrant bunga terbang" in the Ceram region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Fagraea tacapala subsp. ceramensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Fagraea tacapala subsp. ceramensis is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used as a topical application in traditional medicine to promote wound healing and reduce pain.
